Home › Economics

Traffic Economics

CPV analysis, attribution models, and ROI frameworks. The math behind channel allocation decisions.

7 articles

Channel Profitability Analysis: Revenue Per Visitor by Traffic Source

Different traffic sources generate drastically different revenue per visit. Calculate true profitability by measuring revenue, conversion rates, and lifetime value across channels.

Read analysis →

Channel Economics: Calculate the True Cost Per Visitor for SEO, Paid, Email, and Social

Stop believing CPV metrics that ignore time, tools, and opportunity costs. Learn to calculate the true cost per visitor across organic search, paid acquisition, email marketing, and social channels using a full economic model.

Read analysis →

Customer Acquisition Cost by Channel: CAC Benchmarks for Organic, Paid, Social, and Referral

Compare customer acquisition costs across organic search, paid ads, social media, and referral channels with 2025-2026 benchmark data from HubSpot, ProfitWell, and SEMrush.

Read analysis →

Organic Traffic Valuation: How to Value Organic Traffic as a Business Asset

Organic traffic is a quantifiable business asset worth 24-36x monthly revenue in acquisition multiples. Learn three valuation models for your organic traffic portfolio.

Read analysis →

Portfolio Rebalancing for Traffic: When to Increase Investment vs Cut Losses

Learn when to double down on traffic channels and when to divest. Master rebalancing triggers, identify positive unit economics, and execute portfolio shifts without disrupting revenue.

Read analysis →

Traffic Portfolio Modeling: Apply Portfolio Theory to Traffic Diversification Metrics and Risk Scoring

Apply Modern Portfolio Theory to traffic acquisition. Calculate diversification metrics, risk scores, and optimal channel allocation using financial modeling adapted for publishers.

Read analysis →

Traffic Source ROI Comparison: Cost Per Visit Analysis Across 15 Channels

Compare true cost per visit across 15 traffic channels including SEO, paid search, email, social, and referral. Data-driven ROI analysis with full economic modeling.

Read analysis →
